title: michelia phellocarpa
intro: Michelia phellocarpa, also known as the White Star Magnolia, is a flowering plant species in the Magnoliaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Michelia phellocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine formulations and as a local remedy for various health conditions.
